results.rendered_html:
paśya (von 1. paś) adj. sehend, schauend, die richtige Einsicht habend  P. 3,1,137 . yadā paśyaḥ paśyate rukmavarṇaṃ kartāramīśaṃ puruṣaṃ brahmayonim  MUṆḌ. UP. 3,1,3 . na paśyo mṛtyuṃ paśyati  CHĀND. UP. 7,26,2 .
— Vgl. a˚, asūryaṃ˚, ugraṃ˚, māṃ˚.
